title: E signature "esign" on WordDocs
excerpt:
I would love to be able to draft and issue / share documens as contracts in the CRM / then flow through to our product delovery team. Instead of using a third party tool like Doc u Sign or Better Proposals.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to be able to draft and issue / share documens as contracts in the CRM / then flow through to our product delovery team. Instead of using a third party tool like Doc u Sign or Better Proposals.

Also for internal documents get sign off content is correct and “Save” the document as read only.

posts.author: Ishika (Ishika )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

You can try Bolo – eSign PDF Generator on the monday marketplace that lets you draft contracts from board data, get signatures (even internal sign-off), and save the final doc.

It also integrates with other CRMs like HubSpot, Pipedrive, and more.

It’s easy to use, and they have a good product team that keeps working on the enhancements every time.
